Resolution: Removed any hardcoded override; v3 uses actual Monte Carlo outputs from mc_summary and CSV/report values are generated from the same object.
Scenarios re-run the full model with different assumptions; low/high churn now produce different Month24 ARR outcomes.
New-logo acquisition is now an independent customer-rate input; ARR is an output and can decline.
ARR now follows a bridge identity: retained after churn + reactivated ARR + new-logo ARR + expansion ARR - contraction ARR.
Sensitivity tables now come from full model re-runs under different scenarios.
Higher churn reduces customers and ARR because acquisition no longer plugs to a target.
Rates are now cohort-specific and state-responsive to price pressure, competition, macro shock, and seasonality.
Voluntary curve is sourced from Antenna cumulative points with documented interpolation; involuntary curve is explicitly derived from Recurly aggregate recovery evidence.
Removed arbitrary repeat multipliers; repeat churners simply re-enter the same pool logic.
Ending subscribers now satisfy the exact bridge identity every month.
Tenure buckets 0-6, 7-12, and 13-24+ now affect churn.
Added recession, competition, saturation, and bull scenarios with materially wider output range.
Scenario set now includes recession, competition, and saturation cases.
Month 1 net churn now reflects no reactivation offset and is computed directly from the bridge.
Removed any acquisition / ARR floor that forced positive growth.
Removed calendar-promo logic; price pressure is scenario driven and continuous.
Derived curve now extends through month 6 and remaining months are explicitly zero.
All reports pull their quoted values directly from the same CSV-backed objects produced in v3 generation.
